workspace_mapping.format: JSON containing the absolute file URI of the workspace folder
workspace_mapping.session_link: Workspace chats are stored in state.vscdb within the same hash directory.

artifacts: Composer artifacts and AI-generated code blocks exist directly as diffs in the editor state or SQLite history.
tasks: Maintained ephemerally in the AI Chat SQLite blobs.
tool_calls: Stored within the AI chat blobs in state.vscdb
code_changes: Diffs and code changes are stored within state.vscdb chat blobs.
git_state: Cursor automatically commits/diffs to local git depending on settings.
recommended_extractors: Use SQLite driver to extract 'state.vscdb' keys matching 'chat' or 'aichat'.
Read .cursorrules and .cursor/rules/*.mdc directly as they contain the explicit mental model/instructions.
Monitor globalStorage/anysphere.cursor-commits/checkpoints/ to retrieve before/after snapshots of multi-file generations.
